channel.title: Hutch
channel.description: Updates for Hutch — multi-tool macOS utility from Coursion.

item.title: Version 0.1.3
item.description: Polish: Toggles panel auto-dismisses when you click outside or on another app. Sidebar rows in Settings are fully clickable across the row, not just the icon and label. Permissions sidebar attention-dot rendered correctly (halo behind the dot, both centered).
